name: iShares Silver Trust
business: The iShares Silver Trust holds silver bullion and issues shares representing fractional undivided beneficial interests in its net assets. Shares trade on NYSE Arca under the ticker SLV. The trust is passive and seeks to reflect the performance of the price of silver.
namedSuppliers: JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A., London Branch
The Bank of New York Mellon

exposures.sentence: The assets of the Trust consist primarily of silver held by the Trust's custodian on behalf of the Trust.
